action_set_definitions.name: get_policy_rules
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current corporate expense policy rules, including category limits and prohibited items.

action_set_definitions.name: search_reports
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for expense reports based on submitter name or description keywords.

submitter.description: The name of the employee who submitted the reports.

action_set_definitions.name: get_report_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific report, including FPAA flags and system lock status.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the report.

action_set_definitions.name: get_receipt_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves OCR data and metadata for a receipt, including itemized lines and attendee counts for meals.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the report associated with the receipt.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_fpaa_conflict
action_set_definitions.description: Clears the automated FPAA lock on a record after manual reconciliation.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the report.

resolution_note.description: Explanation of how the conflict was reconciled.

action_set_definitions.name: update_report_final_status
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the final status of a report. Can adjust the final approved amount if certain items are rejected.

report_id.description: The unique identifier of the report.

status.description: The final status of the report.

approved_amount.description: The final amount to be paid out (must match total_amount unless partially_approved).

audit_note.description: Detailed reasoning for the status and any amount adjustments.

state_description.reports: A list of expense report objects, each containing id, submitter, amount, currency, category, timestamp, and current status (e.g., pending, under_review, approved, rejected).
state_description.receipt_store: A mapping of report IDs to their digital receipt metadata, including OCR confidence scores and image URLs.
state_description.policy_rules: The corporate expense policy limits per category (e.g., Meal limit: $50) used to calculate compliance flags.
state_description.audit_logs: An internal log of all modifications made to report statuses during the current session.

EXP-TR-7701.ocr_summary: 3 Nights Room Charge: $900.00; Taxes: $150.00; In-Room Mini-bar: $45.00; Hotel Spa: $155.00. Total: $1250.00

EXP-TR-7702.ocr_summary: Dinner for 3. Items: Steak, Wine, Appetizers. Total: $280.00. Payment: Corp Card ...8812.

audit_logs.details: EXP-TR-7702: FPAA Lock triggered. MCC 5813 (Drinking Places) conflicts with user category 'Office Supplies'. Manual MCC reconciliation and attendee substantiation required before status transition.
